name: CLX - Sentinel Webhook Health Probe v1

nodes.name: Every 30 min
nodes.notes: Runs every 30 minutes. Probes 11 curated critical webhook endpoints. Fires sentinel_alerts when any return 404 (the canonical 'webhook not registered' failure mode). Emails Mary immediately when 3+ endpoints are down — that's a sign the n8n webhook map needs a restart.
